info.name: S&N Admin API
info.description: Complete admin API collection for the S&N store dashboard. All admin endpoints require Bearer token authentication.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Email-based authentication with one-time activation codes.

request.description: Send the admin email to receive a 6-digit activation code. If the email does not exist, a new user account is created.
Submit the 6-digit activation code. Returns an accessToken (JWT). Code expires after 5 minutes.
Request a fresh activation code if the previous one expired.

item.name: File Uploads (AWS S3)
item.description: Upload and delete images via pre-signed S3 URLs. Required before creating any resource with images.

request.description: Get pre-signed URL(s) for uploading files. Allowed folders: Offers, ImageSlider, Category, SubCategory, SocialReview, Product. Allowed types: image/jpeg, image/jpg, image/png, image/gif, image/webp, image/svg+xml, image/bmp, image/tiff.
Delete an image from S3. The fileName is the mediaId path portion.

item.name: Group & Size Management
item.description: Groups define sizing types (letters/numeric). Sizes belong to groups. Set up before categories.

item.name: Category Management
item.description: Manage product categories. Requires groupSize and iconId.

request.description: Cascading: also soft-deletes all sub-categories and products under this category.
Cascading: also restores all sub-categories and products under this category.
Cascading: permanently deletes all sub-categories, products, variants, and S3 images under this category. Irreversible.

item.name: Category Icons
item.description: SVG icons assigned to categories. Each icon has a unique key.

response.name: Duplicate key

item.name: Sub-Category Management
item.description: Sub-categories belong to a category and require a groupSize.

request.description: Cascading: also soft-deletes all products under this sub-category.
Cascading: also restores all products under this sub-category.
Cascading: permanently deletes all products, variants, and S3 images under this sub-category. Irreversible.
All fields optional. If name is sent, both ar and en are required inside it.

item.name: Shipping Management
item.description: Shipping options shown at checkout. Accessible by admin and user roles.

request.description: All fields optional. If name is sent, both ar and en are required inside it.

item.name: Product Management
item.description: CRUD for products. Requires categories, colors, and at least one variant.

body.raw:
{
  "name": { "ar": "بنطلون قطني", "en": "Cotton Pants" },
  "description": { "ar": "بنطلون قطني مريح", "en": "Comfortable cotton pants" },
  "price": 500,
  "wholesalePrice": 200,
  "salePrice": 350,
  "saleStartDate": 0,
  "saleEndDate": 0,
  "category": "<categoryId>",
  "subCategory": "<subCategoryId>",
  "defaultImage": "https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/Product/...",
  "albumImages": [
    "https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/Product/..."
  ],
  "sizeChartImage": "https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/Product/...",
  "variants": [
    { "size": "xs", "color": "<colorId>", "quantity": 10 },
    { "size": "s", "color": "<colorId>", "quantity": 5 },
    { "size": "m", "color": "<colorId>", "quantity": 8 }
  ]
}

request.description: Permanently deletes the product, its variants, and all associated S3 images.
20 items per page. Sorted by createdAt descending.
Returns product with populated category, subCategory, and variants (with color details).
Fuzzy search by name (Arabic and English). Returns _id and name only.
Dashboard analytics: product stats, category counts, order metrics, customer totals, last 7 days revenue.

item.name: Variant Management
item.description: Manage individual size + color + stock combinations on products.

request.description: productId in body is used to update the product's sold-out status after deletion.

item.name: Image Slider (Hero Section)
item.description: Banner images on the storefront. Each record holds small (mobile) + large (desktop) images.

request.description: Also deletes associated S3 images.

item.name: Social Reviews
item.description: Social proof images on the storefront.

request.description: Also deletes the associated S3 image.

item.name: Offers
item.description: Promotions applied automatically at checkout. Types: fixed_discount, free_shipping.

request.description: If a new image is provided, the old S3 image is deleted automatically.
Also deletes the associated S3 image.

item.name: Wishlist (Admin View)
item.description: View all products customers have added to their wishlists.

item.name: Order Management
item.description: Admin order management: view, filter, update status, apply free shipping.

query.description: under_review, confirmed, ordered, shipped, delivered, cancelled, deleted

request.description: Returns order with populated customer, customerInfo, shipping, product images, and colors.
Valid statuses: under_review, confirmed, ordered, shipped, delivered, cancelled, deleted. Stock is automatically adjusted on status transitions.
Sets shipping cost to 0 and recalculates totalAmount. No request body needed.
